top_signals.why_it_matters: Geopolitical escalation affecting commodities, shipping and cross-asset volatility.

top_signals.title: Philippines Raises $2.5 Billion in Its Second Bond Deal of 2026
top_signals.summary: The Philippines raised $2.5 billion from its second international bond sale of the year, seizing the opportunity to finance government spending as borrowing costs ease amid optimism on a potential US-Iran peace agreement.

top_signals.title: Sarvam Becomes India's Latest AI Unicorn
top_signals.summary: Sarvam AI has become India's latest AI unicorn after raising $234M from investors including HCL Tech, Bessemer, and Khosla Ventures. Co-founder, Pratyush Kumar, joined Paul Allen on Insight with Haslinda Amin t (Source: Bloomberg)
top_signals.why_it_matters: AI and semiconductor developments impacting technology leadership and capex cycles.
